data.content: Implementation complete on commit b85d2479. Added gpt-5.6-sol, gpt-5.6-terra, and gpt-5.6-luna to Codex scanning; added canonical Sol/Terra/Luna identities; verified the unchanged model_reasoning_effort path for all three; updated deterministic tests, extractor audit, and identity contract. Gates: lint passed, tsc --noEmit passed, 2,894 unit tests passed with 11 skipped and 42 todo, production build passed.
